s09.badge: Start with 4 people and one project
s09.titleLine2: If it's not what we promised, we'll help you leave.

s02.title: Three ideas that separate profitable agencies from

cards.heading: Utilization ≠ profitability
cards.body: Seeing the team at 86% doesn't mean billing 86%. Measure the real gap between used capacity and accrued revenue, month after month.

cards.heading: Integrated flow
cards.body: Plan, execute, measure, and forecast on one surface. No parallel Excel, no Slack to find who's doing what.

cards.heading: Data to the cent
cards.body: Auditable F1–F4 formulas + EHR. Every euro of accrued revenue is traceable — exportable to Excel, CSV, or via API.

s03.title: Every role gets its
s03.subtitle: Not another PM tool. Each role opens exactly what they need.

roles.label: Leaders
roles.heading: All hours, one grid
roles.description: The planner shows impact before you save: dependencies, absences, and costs split across months.
bullets: Assignment with impact calculation and redistribution assistant
Blockers and dependencies visible before they escalate
Real cost when a week spans two months (to the cent)

roles.label: Team members
roles.heading: Your day on one screen

bullets: Per-task timer in sidebar and Time page
Today's priorities and blockers without Slack chasing
Fast weekly close: 2 minutes per person

roles.heading: Pacing and delivery without Excel

Overload detected before it escalates

bullets: Absences and holidays integrated in the planner
Real effective capacity per person and team
Load and hours reports exportable for payroll

Export Excel/CSV/JSON or via API

s01.subtitle: Plan, execute, measure, and forecast without jumping between Excel, Slack, and a different dashboard for each thing.
s01.secondaryCta: The cost of not tracking (3 min)

s05.title: Your real pipeline,
s05.subtitle: Read-only OAuth for Ads, REST API, and full exports. Your data stays yours.

integrations.title: Google Ads
integrations.desc: Read-only OAuth. Pacing synced per account and campaign.

integrations.title: Meta Ads
integrations.desc: Monthly budget target and live deviations.

integrations.title: REST API
integrations.desc: Documented endpoints, JS SDK, token authentication.

integrations.title: Timer
integrations.desc: Time tracked inside Taimbox. Validated in the weekly close.

integrations.title: Weekly Forecast
integrations.desc: Weekly close and forecast with suggested redistribution.

integrations.title: Exports
integrations.desc: Excel, CSV, and JSON. Your data, always yours, in your model.

s05.ppcBody: Connect once with read-only OAuth. Taimbox syncs spend, ROAS, CPL, and conversions hourly, groups accounts by client, and projects month-end. If a campaign will blow the budget, you know on day 12, not the last day.
ppcBullets: Account grouping into virtual clients (keyword rules).
Automatic forecast: where you'll land this month at the current pace.

s06.title: Your client's data.
s06.subtitle: Postgres RLS isolation in the database — not in the app. Read-only OAuth for Ads. PCI delegated to Stripe. Encrypted daily backups.

cards.title: Per-agency isolation (RLS)
cards.body: Every row in every table belongs to your agency_id. Postgres rejects by design any query that tries to cross it — not an app layer, it's in the database.

cards.title: TLS 1.3 + AES-256 at rest
cards.body: Transit encrypted with TLS 1.3 and data at rest with AES-256 on managed disks. Daily backups encrypted with the same policy.

cards.title: Read-only OAuth scopes for Ads
cards.body: Connect Google Ads and Meta with read-only tokens. We don't touch your account: we read pacing, spend, and campaigns without write permissions.

cards.title: EU data, PCI delegated to Stripe
cards.body: Your information in EU regions. Payments delegated to Stripe (PCI DSS Level 1) — Taimbox never touches card numbers. DPO available.

s07.title: Start with four people.
s07.subtitle: Early Adopter active: the first agencies keep 50% lifetime before official pricing applies.

plans.name: Starter

plans.desc: For agencies with PPC, deadlines, and finance oversight.

plans.name: Enterprise
plans.desc: For holdings and agencies > 50 people with SLA.
